genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 14 September 2024

species.citation: Elmer ex Nagel , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 50 (1914) 477 ; Elmer, LPB 7 (1915) 2693; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 23; Jacobs, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1960) 151; Type: Elmer 11744, Mindanao: Mt Apo, Sep-1909.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Philippines. MINDANAO: Cotabato, Davao del Sur, Misamis Occidental.

species.citation: Blume , Fl. Javae Jugl. (1829) 14 ; Jacobs, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1960) 150. = Engelhardia parvifolia C.DC. , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 16(2.1) (1864) 141 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 23.
species.distribution: Borneo, Cambodia, India, Java, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. BILIRAN, CATANDUANES, CEBU (photos), LUZON: Abra, Apayao, Aurora (photos), Bataan, Cagayan, Camarines, Ifugao, Isabela, Laguna, Mountain Province, Pampanga, Quezon, Rizal, MINDANAO, MINDORO, SAMAR.

species.citation: Lesch. ex Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 528 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 23; Jacobs, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1960) 151. = Engelhardia rigida Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 528 ; Jacobs, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1960) 148. = Engelhardia subsimplicifolia Merr. , Publ. Bur. Sci. Gov. Lab. 35 (1906) 6 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 23. = Engelhardia spicata var. integra (Kurz) W.E.Manning ex Steenis , Fl. Males., 1st Ser. 6 (1972) 953; ≡ Engelhardia villosa var. integra Kurz , Forest Fl. Burma 2 (1877) 492; ≡ Engelhardia zambalensis Elmer , LPB 9 (1934) 3195. ≠ Engelhardia spicata var. colebrookeana auct. non (Lindl. ex Wall.) Koord. & Valeton ; Kuntze, Rev. Gen. Pl. 1 (1891) 637; Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 23.
species.distribution: Bhutan, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Tibet, Vietnam. BILIRAN, LUZON: Abra, Apayao (photos), Benguet, Ifugao, Laguna, Mountain Province, Rizal (photos), MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao Oriental (photos), Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur (photos), NEGROS, PANAY (photos).
species.notes: Note by P.B. Pelser (4-Sep-20): Zhang et al. (2020) indicate that Engelhardia rigida is best considered to form a species complex with Engelhardia spicata. (?-)1000-2000(-2500)m.
